Chapter 1: Money Rich, Time Poor

Society vastly underestimates the value of time

Most people voluntarily forfeit their time for money or social pressures.

People spend a significant portion of their lives “working,” most often performing mindless, unenjoyable

Cypherstig is contantly devouring content produced by Bitcoin thought leaders across the globe to bring you comprehensive notes and unique perspectives, fueling a curious, more knowledgable community.

Delivered once a week, at most.
